algorithm_input.title: NCARB-derived multi-floor fire alarm zone partition
algorithm_input.design_intent: Paraphrased NCARB-derived scenario: IBC table lookup and fire alarm zoning. The optimizer uses fixed source-grounded code semantics while tuning visible design parameters and public scenario-model trade-offs.

scenario_facts.ncarb_scenario_theme: IBC table lookup and fire alarm zoning
scenario_facts.scenario_variant_differentiator: Alarm zone design variant; helper divides zone area by decision variable zone_count.

query_preferences.meaning: prefer fewer alarm zones while preserving coverage per zone

public_scenario_model.purpose: Non-normative task physics/objective-closure constraints visible to optimizers; contains no expected rule IDs or labels.

algorithm_input.visible_input_note: Visible task input only. Algorithms may also read the public scenario model and rule library. Rule labels, rule-derived feasible-region answers, and rule-id bindings remain hidden evaluation references.

source_task_origin.ncarb_scenario_theme: IBC table lookup and fire alarm zoning

algorithm_input.scenario_variant_note: Parameterized variant with substantive changes in facts, bounds, weights, or document context; not a fully independent real project case.
algorithm_input.scenario_variant_differentiator: Alarm zone design variant; helper divides zone area by decision variable zone_count.
algorithm_input.nonlinear_or_auxiliary_note: Contains coverage_per_zone_score <= zone_area_sf / (1000 * zone_count), where the denominator includes decision variable zone_count.
